_meta.description: Structured engagement types for BNM RMiT IESP assessments

engagementTypes.name: Data Centre Resilience Assessment
engagementTypes.frequency: Every 3 years OR material change to DC infrastructure
triggerConditions: Last DCRA completed more than 36 months ago

Material change to DC infrastructure (relocation, major structural modifications, power/cooling changes, tier classification change, capacity expansion, physical security system changes, owned-to-third-party transition, consolidation/decommissioning)
BNM direction under para 1.4 or 17.4
scopeDomains: Redundancy and single points of failure (power, cooling, network, storage)

engagementTypes.name: Network Resilience Assessment
engagementTypes.frequency: Every 3 years OR material network change
triggerConditions: Last NRA completed more than 36 months ago

Material network design change (core topology redesign, new network zones, WAN architecture changes, internet edge changes, security control changes, DC network redesign, remote access architecture changes, business unit integration, cloud connectivity migration, new communication channels)
BNM direction under para 1.4 or 17.4
scopeDomains: Network resilience and reliability (redundancy, failover, DR, carrier management)
Network security controls (firewall, IDS/IPS, WAF, DDoS, NAC, VPN, wireless, API gateway)
Network segmentation (zones, DMZ, microsegmentation, third-party isolation)

engagementTypes.name: Cloud Services Pre-Implementation Review
engagementTypes.appendixScope: Appendix 10 (Part A: 7 governance areas, Part B: 14 design/control areas)
engagementTypes.frequency: First-time adoption of public cloud for critical systems
prerequisites: Comprehensive FI risk assessment covering Appendix 10 Part A and Part B
CISO/board chair signed confirmation (Appendix 7 Part B attestation)
Independent external pre-implementation review (this IESP engagement)
triggerConditions: First-time adoption of public cloud for critical systems
First-time use of materially different cloud deployment model for critical systems
BNM direction under para 17.4
scopeDomains: Cloud strategy and governance (App10 Part A: 7 areas)
Network security (VPC, security groups, private connectivity)
Regulatory compliance (data residency, BNM access, PDPA)

engagementTypes.name: Emerging Technology Pre-Implementation Review
engagementTypes.appendixScope: Appendix 9 (5 assessment areas: governance, risk assessment, acceptance criteria, controls, production prerequisites)
engagementTypes.frequency: First-time production deployment of emerging technology for critical systems
prerequisites: Comprehensive FI risk assessment covering Appendix 9 areas
CISO/board chair signed confirmation (Appendix 7 Part B attestation)
Independent external pre-implementation review (this IESP engagement)
triggerConditions: First-time production deployment of emerging technology
Material expansion (pilot to enterprise-wide, non-critical to critical)
Material change in risk profile of existing deployment
Periodic review (at least every 3 years)
BNM direction under para 1.4 or 17.4
emergingTechnologies: AI/ML (LLMs, generative AI, predictive analytics, RPA with cognitive capabilities)
Distributed Ledger Technology (blockchain, tokenisation, smart contracts)
Internet of Things (connected devices, smart ATMs, wearable payments)
Advanced Analytics (real-time streaming, alternative data, graph analytics)
Immersive Technologies (VR, AR for customer engagement)
scopeDomains: Governance arrangements (board approval, framework, policies, ethical principles)
Risk assessment (technology-specific, model risk, concentration, obsolescence)
Acceptance criteria (go-live, performance thresholds, security baseline, ethical assessment)
Controls (security, access, monitoring, human oversight, kill switch, change management)
Production prerequisites (security testing, resilience testing, operational readiness)
aiMlSpecificAreas: Data governance (training data quality, bias, lineage, consent)
Explainability (proportionate to risk of use case)
Bias and fairness (protected characteristics, fairness metrics)
Model drift (accuracy drift, data drift, retraining triggers)
Adversarial robustness (prompt injection, jailbreaking, data exfiltration)

engagementTypes.name: Digital Services Enhancement Assurance
engagementTypes.frequency: Prior to launch of new or materially enhanced digital services
triggerConditions: Digital services enhancement does not meet simplified notification criteria (Appendix 6)
New digital service launch requiring IESP assessment
scopeDomains: Access control (user registration, provisioning, privilege management)
Customer authentication (MFA, session management, account lockout)
Transaction security (authentication, authorisation, fraud monitoring, encryption)

engagementTypes.name: Subsequent Cloud/Emerging Tech Notification
engagementTypes.frequency: Each subsequent adoption of cloud/emerging tech for critical systems
prerequisites: Prior 17.1 consultation completed with no BNM concerns
Enhanced TRMF for cloud/emerging tech in place
Independent assurance on the enhanced framework (IESP required)
triggerConditions: Material alteration to prior assessments/representations to BNM
Subsequent cloud or emerging technology adoption for critical systems
engagementTypes.exemptionClause: 17.3 — enhancements that do NOT materially alter risk profile (FI must document materiality determination)

engagementTypes.name: BNM Discretionary Direction Review
triggerConditions: BNM identifies material technology risk management weaknesses (para 1.4)
BNM issues directive (para 17.4)
Typically after supervisory examinations, incident escalations, or thematic reviews

onlineTransactionRequirements.area: Access Control (customer authentication, MFA, session management)
Online Transaction Security (authentication, fraud monitoring, encryption)

App7-PartA.name: Risk Assessment Report
App7-PartA.description: FI details, ESP details, application details, technology risk assessment, QA, authorised signatory

App7-PartB.name: Confirmation Letter
App7-PartB.description: 9-point attestation by CISO/board chair confirming risk assessment, control adequacy, and readiness

App7-PartC.name: IESP Compliance Statement
App7-PartC.description: ESP's negative attestation on control effectiveness. Options: A (clean), B (with exceptions), C (adverse)

App7-PartD.name: Minimum Controls Attestation
App7-PartD.description: Negative attestation on Appendix 7 Part D minimum control requirements

evidenceHierarchy.description: ESP directly observes control in operation
